title: Platinum Powers
description: Adds powers using a mod called palladium.
body:
I made this addon for fun and so I can grow as an addon pack creator. If you want info on upcoming updates, find any bugs, or want to make a suggestion you can post them in the discord.

**Current Powers:**

- **Vampirism (JJBA)**
- **Viltrumite**
- **Killer Frost (CW)**
- **Powerplex**

**Planned Content:**

- **Adding More Powers**
- **Structures**
- **Adding a Pillarman evolution to Vampirism**
- **Adding ULF**

Trello Link: https://trello.com/b/Vh3t3NG2/platinum-powers



Dependencies: Palladium, Gravestone: Core, Attributes Lib., KubeJS



Discord: https://discord.gg/gy5MsJ4ZEF
